compliances.name: Factory Annual Return (Form No. 21 & 22)
compliances.description: Annual return under Factories Act 1948 to the Chief Inspector of Factories

compliances.name: Factory License Renewal
compliances.description: Annual renewal of factory license under Factories Act
compliances.penalty: Manufacturing without valid license is punishable

compliances.name: Pollution NOC / Consent to Operate Renewal
compliances.description: Consent to Operate (CTO) renewal under Air & Water Acts from State Pollution Control Board

compliances.name: BIS Certification Renewal
compliances.description: Bureau of Indian Standards certification renewal for regulated products

compliances.name: Annual Environment Statement
compliances.description: Annual environmental statement in Form V to State Pollution Control Board

compliances.name: Hazardous Waste Annual Return
compliances.description: Annual return for hazardous waste generated/handled under Hazardous Waste Management Rules
compliances.penalty: Imprisonment up to 5 years and fine

compliances.name: Labour Cess Return (BOCW)
compliances.description: Building & Other Construction Workers cess if construction activities ongoing

IT / ITES.description: Software, IT services, BPO, KPO, data centers

compliances.name: STPI SOFTEX Form Filing (Quarterly)
compliances.description: Software export declaration in SOFTEX form to STPI/RBI for STP units
compliances.penalty: FEMA violations, penalty up to 3x the amount

compliances.name: STPI Annual Performance Report
compliances.description: Annual performance and achievement report to STPI
compliances.penalty: Show cause notice, suspension of STPI benefits

compliances.name: SEZ Unit Quarterly Returns (Form I)
compliances.description: Quarterly production and export performance return for SEZ units

compliances.name: POSH Annual Report
compliances.description: Annual report on Sexual Harassment complaints to District Officer (mandatory for 10+ employees)
compliances.penalty: Rs 50,000 fine and possible license cancellation

compliances.name: DoT OSP Registration Renewal
compliances.description: Other Service Provider registration renewal with DoT for BPO/call centres

Healthcare.description: Hospitals, clinics, diagnostic labs, pharmacies, medical devices

compliances.name: NABH Accreditation Renewal
compliances.description: National Accreditation Board for Hospitals renewal (valid for 3 years, surveillance annual)

compliances.name: Biomedical Waste Annual Report
compliances.description: Annual report on biomedical waste generation and disposal to SPCB under BMW Rules 2016
compliances.penalty: Fine up to Rs 1 lakh per violation

compliances.name: Drug License Renewal (Form 20/21)
compliances.description: Retail/wholesale drug license renewal under Drugs & Cosmetics Act
compliances.penalty: Imprisonment up to 3 years, fine up to Rs 5 lakh

compliances.name: Clinical Establishment Registration Renewal
compliances.description: Annual renewal of registration under Clinical Establishments (Registration & Regulation) Act 2010

compliances.name: PCPNDT Quarterly Return (Form H)
compliances.description: Quarterly return on use of ultrasound machines under PC-PNDT Act

compliances.name: Fire NOC Renewal
compliances.description: Annual renewal of Fire NOC for hospital buildings

Construction / Real Estate.description: Builders, developers, contractors, real estate agencies

compliances.name: RERA Project Quarterly Update
compliances.description: Quarterly update of project status on RERA portal (mandatory for registered projects)

compliances.name: RERA Annual Audit Report
compliances.description: Annual CA-certified audit report for RERA registered projects

compliances.name: BOCW Labour Cess Return
compliances.description: Building & Other Construction Workers cess deposit (1% of construction cost) and return

compliances.name: BOCW Annual Return
compliances.description: Annual return of construction workers employed under BOCW Act

compliances.name: Environment Clearance Compliance Report
compliances.description: Six-monthly compliance report for projects requiring Environment Clearance

compliances.name: IEC (Import Export Code) Updation
compliances.description: Annual updation/validation of IEC on DGFT portal (mandatory even if no changes)

compliances.name: RoDTEP / MEIS Claim Filing
compliances.description: Remission of Duties and Taxes on Exported Products (RoDTEP) claim on Icegate

compliances.name: FSSAI License Renewal
compliances.description: FSSAI central/state license renewal for food trading/distribution (applicable if food products traded)
compliances.penalty: Rs 2 lakh fine, imprisonment up to 6 months

compliances.name: Legal Metrology License Renewal
compliances.description: Annual renewal of dealer/packer license under Legal Metrology Act

FMCG / Food Processing.description: Food manufacturing, processing, packaged foods, beverages

compliances.name: FSSAI Annual Return (Form D-1)
compliances.description: Annual return by food business operator to FSSAI by May 31

compliances.name: FSSAI Central License Renewal
compliances.description: FSSAI central license renewal (for turnover > Rs 20 Cr or interstate operations)

compliances.name: Effluent Treatment Plant (ETP) Compliance
compliances.description: Regular submission of effluent quality reports to State Pollution Control Board
compliances.penalty: Closure, fine up to Rs 1 lakh

compliances.name: AGMARK Certification Renewal
compliances.description: AGMARK certification renewal for agricultural products

compliances.name: FPO Mark / Fruit Products Licence
compliances.description: Annual renewal of Fruit Products Order licence for processed fruit/vegetable businesses
compliances.penalty: Prosecution under Prevention of Food Adulteration Act

Financial Services.description: NBFCs, insurance agents, stock brokers, mutual fund distributors

compliances.name: RBI NBFC Quarterly Return (NBS-1, NBS-2)
compliances.description: Quarterly prudential returns by NBFCs to RBI

compliances.name: NBFC Annual Return to RBI
compliances.description: Annual statutory return to RBI — NBS-6, Auditor's Report on statutory compliances
compliances.penalty: Rs 1 lakh per day of default

compliances.name: SEBI Stock Broker Registration Renewal
compliances.description: Annual renewal of SEBI stock broker/sub-broker registration

compliances.name: AMFI ARN Renewal (Mutual Fund Distributor)
compliances.description: AMFI Registration Number (ARN) renewal for mutual fund distributors (3-year cycle, CPE mandatory)

General.description: No industry-specific compliances — only central and state compliances apply
